headline: The Chinese box office isn't the Hollywood kingmaker it used to be. Here's why
summary: Shifting government content controls and postpandemic Hollywood trends have made China less of a player in the global box office landscape.

raw.headline: The Chinese box office isn't the Hollywood kingmaker it used to be. Here's why
raw.summary: Shifting government content controls and postpandemic Hollywood trends have made China less of a player in the global box office landscape.
